# FOCSS core layers

## Why this folder exists

Tokens, utilities, chrome, and per-surface bundles (site vs planner).

## What is here

- tokens/ — theme.css
- chrome/ — shell chrome
- site/bundles/ — homepage, catalog, etc.
- planner/bundles/ — workspace UI
- utilities/, typography/, layout/

---
*Generated by `scripts/generate-contents-md.mjs` — edit manifest, then `npm run docs:sync:all`.*
